---
title: "The energy costs of commuting: A spatial microsimulation approach"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). The energy costs of commuting: A spatial microsimulation approach. *University of Sheffield*."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_energy_2014"
citation-type: "thesis"
citation-type-label: "Thesis"
venue: "University of Sheffield"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
---

**Type:** Thesis
**Venue:** University of Sheffield
**Year:** 2014

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). The energy costs of commuting: A spatial microsimulation approach. *University of Sheffield*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@phdthesis{lovelace_energy_2014,
  type = {Thesis},
  title = {The Energy Costs of Commuting: A Spatial Microsimulation Approach},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin},
  year = {2014},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
  school = {University of Sheffield}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
